info.name: Cloudflare Vectorize API
info.description:
Cloudflare Vectorize is a globally distributed vector database for building AI-powered applications. The API allows developers to create and manage indexes, insert and upsert vectors, and perform similarity queries for semantic search, recommendations, and classification tasks.

Contact Support:
 Name: Cloudflare Support

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the Cloudflare account.
(Required) The name of the Vectorize index.
